title: STATISTICAL INVESTIGATION OF miRNA ALTERATION IN HYPERTHYROIDISM PATIENTS IN AL-ANBAR PROVINCE
author: ALBORISHA, Omer Thamer Marzoog
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Recently, there has been a great deal of interest in microRNAs, often referred to as miRNAs. MicroRNAs are non-protein-coding RNA molecules that are found in certain organs and are responsible for controlling gene expression in eukaryotic animals (Bavelloni et al. 2017).
steps_raw: Recently, there has been a great deal of interest in microRNAs, often referred to as miRNAs. MicroRNAs are non-protein-coding RNA molecules that are found in certain organs and are responsible for controlling gene expression in eukaryotic animals (Bavelloni et al. 2017).
